pain.title: Detect the hidden losses in your industry
pain.subtitle: Every sector has unique losses — scrap, time, energy, material. See them instantly with sector-specific calculation tools.

material.title: Material cost risk
material.text: Setup time, rework and hidden labor erode margin after the estimate looks fine.

labor.title: Labor & time risk
labor.text: Free checks expose visible risk — premium analyzers deliver the full verdict.

overhead.title: Overhead & scope risk
overhead.text: No ERP rollout, no consulting retainer — built for shops, trades and service teams.

freeCheck.title: Run a free sector check
freeCheck.subtitle: {count} sector quick checks with 3–5 inputs. See visible risk in your browser — no account, no safe price, no final verdict.
freeCheck.cardBody: Visible setup and labor exposure — full safe price withheld on free tier.

premiumStep.title: Unlock the full verdict
premiumStep.subtitle: Premium analyzers add minimum safe price, margin leak drivers, suggested action and PDF export — the decision layer operators need before quoting.

meta.title: SectorCalc — Measure hidden loss across {sectorCount} sector areas
meta.description: Your operation is leaking money. SectorCalc helps teams measure hidden loss with sector calculators and premium decision reports — without ERP complexity.

hero.headline: Your operation is leaking money. Measure where.
hero.subtitleLine1: SectorCalc helps teams measure hidden loss in scrap, setup, routes, energy, OEE and margins.
hero.subtitleLine2: Turn sector-specific inputs into calculators, diagnostics and decision reports — without ERP complexity.
hero.supporting: Built for businesses priced out of ERP.

positioning.title: ERP-level calculation logic without ERP complexity.
positioning.text: Most teams still calculate loss, waste, cost and efficiency in spreadsheets, notebooks or guesswork. SectorCalc gives them focused calculators and decision reports they can use immediately.

cnc.label: Sample hidden-loss scenario
cnc.title: CNC scrap and setup loss
cnc.text: A typical CNC shop can lose margin through scrap drift, setup overruns and tooling cost that never appears in the first quote.
cnc.action: Track scrap threshold, setup drift and tool wear before accepting similar jobs.

route.label: Sample hidden-loss scenario
route.title: Route deadhead cost
route.text: Logistics teams often underestimate the cost of empty return trips and non-optimized routing.
route.action: Calculate actual cost per kilometer including deadhead and reoptimize routes quarterly.

energy.label: Benchmark model
energy.title: Energy peak cost exposure
energy.text: Industrial operations can pay 3–5× base rate during peak demand hours without tracking when those hours are.
energy.action: Map your peak consumption hours and shift non-critical loads to off-peak windows.

food.label: Benchmark model
food.title: Food waste and portion drift
food.text: Restaurant and catering operations can lose revenue to untracked waste, overportioning and ingredient spoilage.
food.action: Track portion cost variance and waste by shift to identify training gaps.

measure.title: What you can measure with SectorCalc

platform.title: Industrial calculators. Sector-specific.
platform.stat: {sectorCount} sector areas → 50+ calculator roadmap → Decision reports
platform.text: Free calculators and premium decision reports — manufacturing, logistics, construction, energy and more.

pricing.title: Priced for teams priced out of enterprise software
pricing.singleReport: Single decision reports from $9 — for one-off analysis, export and PDF.

final.title: Find the loss area. Measure the exposure. Make the call.
